purpose: Provides utility methods for geometric calculations, node management, and curve computations in JavaFX applications.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: The JavaFX node to enable or disable

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: Flag to enable (true) or disable (false) the node

parameters.name: cX
parameters.description: The x-coordinate of the circle's center

parameters.name: cY
parameters.description: The y-coordinate of the circle's center

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: The radius of the circle

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x-coordinate of the point to check

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y-coordinate of the point to check

return_value.description: True if the point (x, y) is inside the circle, false otherwise

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x-coordinate of the point to rotate

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y-coordinate of the point to rotate

parameters.name: rX
parameters.description: The x-coordinate of the rotation center

parameters.name: rY
parameters.description: The y-coordinate of the rotation center

parameters.name: angleDeg
parameters.description: The rotation angle in degrees

return_value.description: A double array containing the new coordinates after rotation

parameters.name: t
parameters.description: Point in time (values between 0 - 1)

parameters.name: ap0x
parameters.description: X-coordinate of the start anchor point

parameters.name: ap0y
parameters.description: Y-coordinate of the start anchor point

parameters.name: cp1x
parameters.description: X-coordinate of the control point

parameters.name: cp1y
parameters.description: Y-coordinate of the control point

parameters.name: ap2x
parameters.description: X-coordinate of the end anchor point

parameters.name: ap2y
parameters.description: Y-coordinate of the end anchor point

return_value.description: A double array containing the coordinates of the point on the cubic Bezier curve

parameters.name: t
parameters.description: Point in time (values between 0 - 1)

parameters.name: ap0x
parameters.description: X-coordinate of the start anchor point

parameters.name: ap0y
parameters.description: Y-coordinate of the start anchor point

parameters.name: cp1x
parameters.description: X-coordinate of the first control point

parameters.name: cp1y
parameters.description: Y-coordinate of the first control point

parameters.name: cp2x
parameters.description: X-coordinate of the second control point

parameters.name: cp2y
parameters.description: Y-coordinate of the second control point

parameters.name: ap3x
parameters.description: X-coordinate of the end anchor point

parameters.name: ap3y
parameters.description: Y-coordinate of the end anchor point

return_value.description: A double array containing the coordinates of the point on the quartic Bezier curve
